zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn於1215年1月5日出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾卡素時，他的父親Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog50歲，母親Margaret Corbet27歲。他於1240年與Margaret Verch Howel結婚。他去世於1286年2月21日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利享年71歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn于1215年1月5日出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾卡素时，他的父亲Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog50岁，母亲Margaret Corbet27岁。他于1240年与Margaret Verch Howel结婚。他去世于1286年2月21日在英国英格兰史洛普爾史福斯波利享年71岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

variants.name: Griffudd
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

variants.name: Gruffud
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn was born on 5 January 1215, in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog, was 50 and his mother, Margaret Corbet, was 27. He married Margaret Verch Howel in 1240. He died on 21 February 1286, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn est né le 5 janvier 1215, à Castle, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Margaret Corbet, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Verch Howel en 1240. Il est décédé le 21 février 1286, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn am 5. Januar 1215 in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog 50 und seine Mutter Margaret Corbet 27. Er hat 1240 Margaret Verch Howel geheiratet. Er starb am 21. Februar 1286 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn è nato il il 5 gennaio 1215 nel Castle, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Corbet, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Verch Howel nel 1240. Morì il 21 febbraio 1286, nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwynが1215年1月5日にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアカストルで生まれた時，父Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliogは50歳，母Margaret Corbetは27歳であった。1240年にMargaret Verch Howelと結婚した。彼は1286年2月21日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで71歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn(이)가 1215년 1월 5일 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Corbet(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1240년 Margaret Verch Howel(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1286년 2월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.5 January 1215–21 February 1286: 5 de janeiro de 1215–21 de fevereiro de 1286
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn nasceu em 5 de janeiro de 1215, em Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Corbet, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Verch Howel em 1240. Ele faleceu em 21 de fevereiro de 1286, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn родился 5 января 1215 г. в местности кастл, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Corbet, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Verch Howel в 1240 г. Он умер 21 февраля 1286 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия.

es.5 January 1215–21 February 1286: 5 de enero de 1215–21 de febrero de 1286
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffudd ap Gwenwynwyn nació el 5 de enero de 1215, en Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Margaret Corbet, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margaret Verch Howel en 1240. Murió el 21 de febrero de 1286, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
